summary: Comprehensive Service Desk Audit - All 9 requested features PASSED. Products (2541), Services (716), Tickets (33), Mira AI chat with personalized responses, Admin Service Desk, Member Notifications - all working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Service Desk flows verified working: 1) Shop page shows 2541 products without filtering when no pet selected, 2) Services API returns 716 services from services_master collection, 3) Service Desk at /admin/service-desk loads with 25 tickets visible after admin login, 4) Admin login uses /api/admin/auth/login endpoint, 5) Mira Demo (/mira-demo) responds with personalized AI responses including pet name (Mystique), weather data, and creates tickets (REQ-20260221-0023), 6) Member Notifications Inbox shows 9 unread items including 'Concierge replied' notifications, 7) Landing page has personalized hero image code in Home.jsx (lines 90-130) that fetches user's pet image when logged in.

services_api.details: Services API returns 716 services from services_master collection

tickets_api.details: Tickets API returns 33 total tickets from both tickets and service_desk_tickets collections

admin_login.details: Admin login works with aditya/lola4304 via /api/admin/auth/login

service_desk_ui.details: Service Desk at /admin/service-desk shows 25 tickets with filtering options (by pillar, channel, priority)

mira_chat.details: Mira responds with personalized messages including pet name (Mystique), creates tickets (REQ-20260221-0023), shows weather-aware recommendations (26.3°C in Bengaluru)

notifications_inbox.details: Notifications page shows 9 unread notifications including 'Concierge replied' items and 'Request Received' items

personalized_hero.details: Home.jsx (lines 90-130) fetches user's pet image when logged in and displays it in hero section

shop_page.details: Shop page loads with product grid, tabs (Products/Services), category filters (Celebrate, Dine, Stay, Travel, Care, etc.)

flow_verification.flow_description: Chat Request -> Ticket Created -> Admin Sees in Service Desk -> Admin Replies -> Member Gets Notification
evidence: Mira chat creates tickets (REQ-20260221-0023 visible in response)
Service Desk shows 25 tickets with filtering
